home.subtitle: What would you like to do today?
home.practiceSubtitle: Study your decks with flashcards or talk with Kruu Bingo.
home.updateSubtitle: Add, edit, and organize the words you're learning.

login.title: Log in
login.verified: Email verified. Sign in to continue.
login.invalid: Invalid credentials or email not verified.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: You'll get a verification email next.
signup.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, with at least one letter and one number.
signup.tooMany: Too many requests. Try again later.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sent: If that email exists, a reset link is on its way.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.success: Password updated. You can now log in.
reset.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset.sessionsNote: Existing sessions will be invalidated once you reset your password.
reset.redirecting: Password updated. Redirecting to log in…

verify.success: Email verified! You can now log in.
verify.failed: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verify.title: Email verification

verifySent.title: Check your email
verifySent.body: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.
verifySent.expires: The link expires in 24 hours. Check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive in a few minutes.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languagesDesc: Pick the language you already speak (base) and the language you're studying (target).

decks.title: Flashcards
decks.empty: No decks yet. Create your first deck to get started.
decks.refreshConfirm: This will add {added} items and remove {removed} items. Continue?
decks.upToDate: Deck is already up to date.
decks.deckSettingsDesc: Changing direction adds or removes the matching cards.

flashcards.noCardsDue: No cards are due right now.
flashcards.saveRatingFailed: Could not save your rating. Try again.

practice.exitChat: End session and return to decks
practice.title: Kruu Bingo
practice.captionsPlaceholder: Captions will appear here as you talk.
practice.endConfirmDesc: Your practice stats will be saved.
practice.continueBody: You've been quiet for a while. The session will end soon.
practice.couldNotConnect: Could not connect to OpenAI. Check your API key in Settings.
practice.micDenied: Microphone permission denied. Enable it to talk to Kruu Bingo.
practice.apiError: The voice service reported an error. Please try again.

vocab.title: Vocab
vocab.empty: No vocabulary yet. Add your first word to get started.
vocab.noCreators: No creators to filter by yet.
vocab.deleteItemDesc: This action cannot be undone. The item, its lesson assignment, and its tag assignments will be removed.
vocab.noMatch: No vocab items match your filters.

extraction.title: Extract vocabulary from photos
extraction.subtitle: Upload photos of a textbook page or notes and we'll pull out vocabulary for you to review.
extraction.dropzone: Drag photos here, or click to choose
extraction.reviewSubtitle: Uncheck anything you don't want, then save.
extraction.noneFound: No vocabulary was found in those photos.
extraction.failed: Could not analyze the photos. Please try again.

verify.subject: Verify your email for Kaojai
verify.body: Click below to verify your email address:

reset.subject: Reset your Kaojai password
reset.body: Click below to reset your password:
reset.ignore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

deckBuilder.title: Building a deck
deckBuilder.desc: Select vocabulary to add to your new deck.
deckBuilder.instructions: Select the vocabulary items to include — use the filters to find them.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.empty: No lessons yet. Create your first lesson.

lessonDelete.title: Delete "{name}"?
lessonDelete.reviewDesc: Review what will be removed before confirming.
lessonDelete.pdfs: {count, plural, one {# PDF note} other {# PDF notes}}
lessonDelete.audio: {count, plural, one {# audio file} other {# audio files}}
lessonDelete.links: {count, plural, one {# useful link} other {# useful links}}
lessonDelete.vocabDeleted: {count, plural, one {# vocab item} other {# vocab items}} (only in this lesson)
lessonDelete.images: {count, plural, one {# generated image} other {# generated images}} (for those vocab items)
lessonDelete.vocabReassigned: {count, plural, one {# vocab item} other {# vocab items}} shared with other lessons

lessonNew.title: New Lesson
lessonNew.desc: Create a new lesson. You can add vocab, notes, audio, and links to it afterward.
lessonNew.name: Name

help.all: Everything is said in both {target} and {base}. Every {target} phrase is followed by its {base} translation.
help.frequent: The tutor uses {base} often to support you, with {target} woven in.
help.moderate: The tutor sometimes uses {base} to clarify, aiming for a balance of {target} and {base}.
help.rarely: The tutor mostly uses {target}; it only falls back to {base} if you ask.
help.never: The tutor speaks only in {target} and does not use {base}.

speechSpeed.label: Speed
speechSpeed.intro: Controls how fast Kruu Bingo speaks. "Slow" is easiest for beginners.

help.slow: About half the speed of natural native speech, with clear pauses — easiest for beginners.
help.moderate: About three-quarters the speed of natural native speech — slower, but still flowing.

bulkSelect.visibilityDesc: Items you didn't create are skipped automatically.
bulkSelect.started: {count, plural, one {Started generating # image.} other {Started generating # images.}}
bulkSelect.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
